name: kolbo
description: Kolbo AI skills: generate images and videos with 100+ models, train Visual DNA characters, build branded UGC and DTC ads via Marketing Studio, run a 10-mode product photoshoot, produce Amazon/Shopify marketplace cards, publish HTML artifacts (presentations, landing pages, dashboards), and ship full React apps via the App Builder — all from natural language in your coding agent.

api_key.title: Kolbo API Key
api_key.description: Your Kolbo API key. Create one at https://app.kolbo.ai/developer

api_endpoint.title: API Endpoint
api_endpoint.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://api.kolbo.ai/api). Whitelabel users should point to their tenant's API.
